summary: Completed comprehensive testing of timeline functionality for SAMIDEL textile management system. Backend API endpoints are working excellently, but frontend implementation has UI/UX visibility issues.

minor_bugs.issue: TimelineEventCreate model requires projeto_id in request body despite it being provided via URL parameter
minor_bugs.impact: API consumers must duplicate project_id in both URL and body

ui_bugs.issue: Timeline tab in project detail page redirects to general production timeline instead of showing project-specific timeline
Timeline statistics not prominently displayed in the UI despite being available in API
Timeline filter buttons not easily visible or accessible in the UI
Add event and resolve problem buttons not easily accessible in timeline view
Event grouping by date not clearly visible in UI layout

passed_tests: Timeline filtering by type (timeline, history, checkpoint) - all filters work correctly
Timeline statistics calculation - accurate counts for events, problems, checkpoints, authors
Author information display - names and emails present in all events
Event creation - POST /api/timeline/{project_id} creates events successfully
Event sources separation - timeline, history, checkpoint, system events properly categorized
Navigation to projects page and project selection
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix timeline tab navigation in project detail page - it currently redirects to general timeline instead of showing project-specific timeline. Improve UI visibility of timeline statistics, filters, and event management buttons.
